news.title: Anthropic is having a month
news.description: A human really borks things at Anthropic for the second time this week.

news.title: Salesforce announces an AI-heavy makeover for Slack, with 30 new features
news.description: Slack just got a whole lot more useful.

news.title: OpenAI, not yet public, raises $3B from retail investors in monster $122B fund raise
news.description: OpenAI's latest funding round, led by Amazon, Nvidia, and SoftBank, values the AI lab at $852 billion as it nears an IPO.

news.title: Yupp shuts down after raising $33M from a16z crypto’s Chris Dixon
news.description: Less than a year after launching, with checks from some of the biggest names in Silicon Valley, crowdsourced AI model feedback startup Yupp is closing its business, the company said Tuesday.

news.title: Tech CEOs suddenly love blaming AI for mass job cuts. Why?
news.description: More tech leaders are pointing to job cuts caused by AI tools - and a need for more investment cash.

news.title: AI Has Flooded All the Weather Apps
news.description: Weather forecasting has gotten a big boost from machine learning. How that translates into what users see can vary.

news.title: AI Research Is Getting Harder to Separate From Geopolitics
news.description: A policy change announced by NeurIPS, the world’s leading AI research conference, drew widespread backlash from Chinese researchers this week and then was quickly reversed.

news.title: Widely used Trivy scanner compromised in ongoing supply-chain attack
news.description: Admins: Sorry to say, but it's likely a rotate-your-secrets kind of weekend.
